description: w wersji na telefon - male ekrany - daj mozliwosc tylko przegladania planu (bez widocznego lewego sidebara),zaznaczanie obiektow i ich przesuwanie,  dodawanieobiektow do odpowiedniej warstwy, zmiane nazw/labels, dodawania zdjec - Na malych ekranach jest malo miejsca, wiec ogranicz wielkosc tego interfejsu - najwazniejsza jest mozliwosc przegladania planu w trybie zwyklm i color by status (tak ten checkbox tez powinien byc dostepny)
title: w wersji na telefon - male ekrany - daj mozliwosc tylko przegladania planu (bez widocznego lewego si

criteria.description: MobileBottomBar renders a fixed bottom strip of exactly h-12 (48px) containing a Checkbox element wired to uiState.showStatusColors; toggling it dispatches TOGGLE_STATUS_COLORS
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileBottomBar.tsx and confirm: (1) outer div has className including 'h-12' and 'fixed bottom-0'; (2) Checkbox onCheckedChange calls uiDispatch({type:'TOGGLE_STATUS_COLORS'}); (3) checked prop equals uiState.showStatusColors

criteria.description: The fixed 50vh constant is removed from MobileBottomBar.tsx — no h-[50vh] class remains
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep MobileBottomBar.tsx for 'h-\[50vh\]' — must return zero matches

criteria.description: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx exists and exports a React component accepting an onClose prop; it contains a Select element listing docState.layers and at minimum 7 icon type buttons (camera, square, circle, triangle, star, hexagon, arrow-right)
When an object is selected (uiState.selectedObjectIds.length > 0), MobileBottomBar renders an Input whose value is selectedObject.name and whose onChange dispatches UPDATE_OBJECTS
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileBottomBar.tsx and confirm the conditional block for selectedObjectId renders an Input with value bound to selectedObject.name and onChange dispatching UPDATE_OBJECTS

criteria.description: MobileBottomBar uses two Sheet components (not a mode state machine with 'list'/'edit'/'details' string literals)
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep MobileBottomBar.tsx for string literals 'list', 'edit', 'details' used as mode values — must return zero matches; grep for '<Sheet' — must return at least two matches

criteria.description: The edit Sheet contains an ObjectPhotoGallery component, enabling photo addition on mobile
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileBottomBar.tsx and confirm ObjectPhotoGallery is imported and rendered inside one of the Sheet components

criteria.description: home.tsx mobile layout wrapper div has className including 'pb-12' when isMobile is true
criteria.how_to_verify: Read home.tsx, find the isMobile branch for canvas layout, confirm 'pb-12' is present on the wrapper

criteria.description: MobileAddObjectPanel dispatches SET_ACTIVE_LAYER when layer is changed in the Select, before adding any object
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx and confirm Select onValueChange calls uiDispatch({type:'SET_ACTIVE_LAYER', payload: layerId}) before or alongside the object creation call
